'''gozavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:arabic|arabic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-z-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arabic|arabic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gozavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gozavithi|gozavithi]] || [[word:gozaviji|gozaviji]] || [[word:gozavishi|gozavishi]] || [[word:gozaviki|gozaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gozavuthuthu|gozavuthuthu]] || [[word:gozavujuju|gozavujuju]] || [[word:gozavushushu|gozavushushu]] || [[word:gozavukuku|gozavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gozavuthu|gozavuthu]] || [[word:gozavuju|gozavuju]] || [[word:gozavushu|gozavushu]] || [[word:gozavuku|gozavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gozavufthuf|gozavufthuf]] || [[word:gozavufjuf|gozavufjuf]] || [[word:gozavufshuf|gozavufshuf]] || [[word:gozavufkuf|gozavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gozavethe|gozavethe]] || [[word:gozaveje|gozaveje]] || [[word:gozaveshe|gozaveshe]] || [[word:gozaveke|gozaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gozavothotho|gozavothotho]] || [[word:gozavojojo|gozavojojo]] || [[word:gozavoshosho|gozavoshosho]] || [[word:gozavokoko|gozavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gozavotho|gozavotho]] || [[word:gozavojo|gozavojo]] || [[word:gozavosho|gozavosho]] || [[word:gozavoko|gozavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gozavofthof|gozavofthof]] || [[word:gozavofjof|gozavofjof]] || [[word:gozavofshof|gozavofshof]] || [[word:gozavofkof|gozavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gozavÃŸfthÃŸf|gozavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gozavÃŸfjÃŸf|gozavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gozavÃŸfshÃŸf|gozavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gozavÃŸfkÃŸf|gozavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gozavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|gozavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gozavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|gozavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gozavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|gozavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gozavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|gozavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gozavÃŸfthÃŸf|gozavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gozavÃŸfjÃŸf|gozavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gozavÃŸfshÃŸf|gozavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gozavÃŸfkÃŸf|gozavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gozavÃŸfthÃŸf|gozavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gozavÃŸfjÃŸf|gozavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gozavÃŸfshÃŸf|gozavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gozavÃŸfkÃŸf|gozavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gozavÃḊthÃḊ|gozavÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:gozavÃḊjÃḊ|gozavÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:gozavÃḊshÃḊ|gozavÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:gozavÃḊkÃḊ|gozavÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gozavathatha|gozavathatha]] || [[word:gozavajaja|gozavajaja]] || [[word:gozavashasha|gozavashasha]] || [[word:gozavakaka|gozavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gozavatha|gozavatha]] || [[word:gozavaja|gozavaja]] || [[word:gozavasha|gozavasha]] || [[word:gozavaka|gozavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gozavafthaf|gozavafthaf]] || [[word:gozavafjaf|gozavafjaf]] || [[word:gozavafshaf|gozavafshaf]] || [[word:gozavafkaf|gozavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gozavasha|gozavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gozavshÃḋsha|gozavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozavrosha|gozavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozavmusha|gozavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozavyasha|gozavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogozavnkshÃḋsha|gogozavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogozavnkrosha|gogozavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogozavnkmusha|gogozavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogozavnkyasha|gogozavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gozazavasha|gozazavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gozazavshÃḋsha|gozazavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozazavrosha|gozazavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozazavmusha|gozazavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozazavyasha|gozazavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogozazavnkshÃḋsha|gogozazavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogozazavnkrosha|gogozazavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogozazavnkmusha|gogozazavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogozazavnkyasha|gogozazavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gezÃḊvasha|gezÃḊvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gezÃḊvshÃḋsha|gezÃḊvshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gezÃḊvrosha|gezÃḊvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gezÃḊvmusha|gezÃḊvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gezÃḊvyasha|gezÃḊvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogezÃḊvnkshÃḋsha|gogezÃḊvnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogezÃḊvnkrosha|gogezÃḊvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogezÃḊvnkmusha|gogezÃḊvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogezÃḊvnkyasha|gogezÃḊvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gozfavasha|gozfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gozfavshÃḋsha|gozfavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozfavrosha|gozfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozfavmusha|gozfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozfavyasha|gozfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogozfavnkshÃḋsha|gogozfavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogozfavnkrosha|gogozfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogozfavnkmusha|gogozfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogozfavnkyasha|gogozfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
